The number of threads currently employed in the processing of asynchronous operations.

update AsyncOperationBase
set
	HostId = @hostId,
	StateCode = @lockedState,
	StatusCode = @inProgressStatus,
	StartedOn = @modifiedOn,
	ModifiedOn = @modifiedOn,
	ModifiedBy = CreatedBy,
	RetryCount = case coalesce(ErrorCode, 0)
					when 0 then coalesce(RetryCount, 0)
					else coalesce(RetryCount, 0)+1
					end
output
	INSERTED.AsyncOperationId,
	INSERTED.OperationType,
	INSERTED.Data,
	INSERTED.DependencyToken,
	INSERTED.RegardingObjectId,
	INSERTED.RegardingObjectIdName,

where
AsyncOperationId in
	(select top(@recordsToSelect) AsyncOperationId from AsyncOperationBase WITH (READPAST, READCOMMITTEDLOCK, UPDLOCK)  
where StateCode = @readyState

update AsyncOperationBase
set StateCode = @readyState, StatusCode = @waitingStatus, RetryCount = 0, PostponeUntil = @postponeUntil
where CorrelationId = @correlationId
	and OperationType = @operationType
	and Statecode = @waitingState
	and RecurrencePattern is NULL
;
if not exists (select * 
	from AsyncOperationBase 
	where CorrelationId = @correlationId
		and OperationType = @operationType
		and StateCode != @completedState
		and RecurrencePattern is NULL
	) 	
	begin
		insert int
{0}-{1}: Operation {2} has been created as state {3}, status {4}.

With TopSuspendedAsyncOperations(AsyncOperationId)
AS
(
Select Top(@numberOfSuspendedOperationsToSelect) AsyncOperationId
from AsyncOperationBase o1
where
	StateCode = @suspendedState
and	((PostponeUntil is NULL) or (PostponeUntil <= @modifiedOn))
and ((DependencyToken is NULL) or (not exists (
	select AsyncOperationId
	from AsyncOperationBase o2
	where
		o2.Sequence < o1.Sequence
	and	o2.DependencyToken = o1.DependencyToken
	and o2.RecurrencePattern is null
	and o2.StateCode in (
{0}-{1}: Operation {2} has been moved to state {3}, status {4}.
{0}-{1}: Operation {2} could not be deleted. Exception: {3}

update AsyncOperationBase
set
	StateCode = @readyState,
	StatusCode = @waitingStatus,
	ModifiedOn = @modifiedOn,
	ModifiedBy = CreatedBy
where
		StateCode = @lockedState
	and HostId = @hostId

update AsyncOperationBase
set
	StateCode = @readyState,
	StatusCode = @waitingStatus,
	ModifiedOn = @modifiedOn,
	ModifiedBy = CreatedBy
where AsyncOperationId IN (
         select AsyncOperationId
         from AsyncOperationBase with (nolock)
         where StateCode = @lockedState
         and HostId like @instanceName
         and HostId <> @asyncQueueHostId
         and HostId <> @priorityQueueHostId)

update AsyncOperationBase WITH  (READPAST,READCOMMITTEDLOCK,UPDLOCK)
set
	ModifiedOn = @modifiedOn,
	ModifiedBy = CreatedBy
where 
		StateCode = @lockedState
	and HostId = @hostId

select
					AsyncOperationId,
					StatusCode
				from AsyncOperationBase WITH (READPAST,READCOMMITTEDLOCK,UPDLOCK)
				where
						StateCode = @lockedState
					and HostId = @hostId
					and StatusCode in (@pausingStatus, @cancelingStatus)

update AsyncOperationBase WITH  (READPAST,READCOMMITTEDLOCK,UPDLOCK)
set
StateCode =
	case StatusCode
		when @cancelingStatus then @completedState
		when @pausingStatus then @suspendedState
		else @readyState
	end,
StatusCode = 
	case StatusCode
		when @cancelingStatus then @canceledStatus
		when @pausingStatus then @pausedStatus
		else @waitingStatus
	end,
ModifiedOn = @utcNow,
ModifiedBy = CreatedBy
where
ModifiedOn < @modifiedOn
and StateCode = @lockedState

Select SUM(Backlog) Backlog, Max(Latency) as Latency FROM
					(
						SELECT COUNT(*) AS Backlog,
							CONVERT(INT, MAX(DATEDIFF(ss, postponeuntil , GETUTCDATE()))) AS Latency 
							FROM AsyncOperationBase WITH(NOLOCK)
							WHERE 
							(StateCode = 1 AND DependencyToken is NULL AND postponeuntil < DateAdd(mi, @InternalSLA, GETUTCDATE()) AND
